jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Oliveboard
jsonLd.description:
Oliveboard invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oliveboard:
Oliveboard is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard!
